ValidationRule.description: SIT Smoke Test must be completed before story can be marked as Successfully Deployed to SIT
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Successfully Deployed to SIT"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), Smoke_Test_SIT_Complete__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Smoke Test SIT must be completed before moving to "Successfully Deployed to SIT". Please close the Smoke Test SIT Activity Task or tick the Smoke Test SIT Complete checkbox first.
